name: Nopales Con Huevos y Serranos
recipeIngredient: 2 Tbsp Small tomatoes, peeled and seeds removed, chopped
1 cup Cooked nopales, cut into small strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the chopped Serrano peppers and onion. Cook until the peppers are soft.
2. Stir in the chopped tomatoes and cook for 2-3 minutes more, until they begin to soften.
3. Add the cooked nopales, cilantro, and beaten eggs to the skillet. Mix gently.
4. Pour grated Monterey Jack cheese over the top of the mixture.
5. Reduce heat to low and cover the skillet. Cook for about 10 minutes or until the eggs are set but still slightly runny on top.
6. Turn off the heat and let the dish sit covered for a few more minutes before serving.
